badge_integration_options.description: A dedicated 40px tall sub-header INSIDE the score card, right below the main paper title.
badge_integration_options.layout: Full-width flex row inside the main card container, ABOVE the 70/30 split but inside the border. Flex justify-between items-center px-4 py-2.

states.gold: bg-[#FEFCE8] text-[#D4A012] border-b border-[#D4A012]/20. Left side: Medal Icon + 'Gold Medalist • #1 in quant-ph • Week 15, 2026'. Right side: 'Share' button with Lucide Share icon.
states.silver: bg-[#F3F4F6] text-[#6B7280] border-b border-gray-200. Same layout but with Silver (#808080) icon.
states.bronze: bg-[#FFF7ED] text-[#CD7F32] border-b border-[#CD7F32]/20. Same layout but with Bronze (#CD7F32) icon.
states.none: The header bar simply does not render. The card starts directly with the 70/30 split.

badge_integration_options.option_name: Option 2: The 'Inline Pill' (Beside the Main Score)
badge_integration_options.description: The badge is treated as a high-priority tag sitting right next to the '1708' Tournament Score.
badge_integration_options.layout: Flex container aligning the Tournament Score and the Badge Pill horizontally. The pill acts as a status indicator.

states.gold: Pill: rounded-full border border-[#D4A012]/30 bg-[#D4A012]/10 px-3 py-1. Text: text-sm font-semibold text-[#D4A012]. Content: '🥇 #1 quant-ph • Week 15'. Share icon is embedded at the end of the pill.
states.silver: Pill: rounded-full border border-gray-300 bg-gray-100 px-3 py-1. Text: text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700. Content: '🥈 #2 quant-ph • Week 15'.
states.bronze: Pill: rounded-full border border-[#CD7F32]/30 bg-[#CD7F32]/10 px-3 py-1. Text: text-sm font-semibold text-[#CD7F32]. Content: '🥉 #3 quant-ph • Week 15'.
states.none: The Tournament Score is left-aligned as usual with no adjacent pill.

badge_integration_options.description: A physical-looking seal overlaid on the top-right corner of the left panel (Tournament panel).
badge_integration_options.layout: Absolute positioned seal (w-12 h-12) over the relative 70% left panel. -top-4 -right-4 or inside the padding top-4 right-4.

states.gold: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#FDE047] to-[#D4A012] rounded-full shadow-lg border-2 border-white text-white font-bold. Center has '#1'. Hover expands a small tooltip 'Gold • quant-ph • Week 15'.
states.silver: bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-200 to-gray-400 rounded-full shadow-lg border-2 border-white text-white font-bold. Center '#2'.
states.bronze: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#FDBA74] to-[#CD7F32] rounded-full shadow-lg border-2 border-white text-white font-bold. Center '#3'.
states.none: No seal rendered. The card remains completely clean.

badge_integration_options.description: A highly stylized approach where a circular medallion bridges the gap between the 70% left panel and 30% right panel.
badge_integration_options.layout: Absolute positioned circle exactly on the border separating the Tournament and Rating sections (left: 70%, translate-x: -50%).

states.gold: A metallic gold circle with a glowing drop-shadow. Contains the rank '#1'. A subtle banner below says 'quant-ph'.
states.silver: A metallic silver circle. Contains rank '#2'.
states.bronze: A metallic bronze circle. Contains rank '#3'.
states.none: The dividing border remains a simple 1px gray line with no medallion.

shareable_badge_design.concept: A premium digital trading card. Aspect ratio 3:4.

layout.container: w-full max-w-md aspect-[3/4] rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden relative shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] border border-white/10 bg-zinc-950
layout.main_visual: A massive, beautifully typeset Rank number (e.g., '#1') in the center. Uses Framer Motion for a 3D tilt effect on hover. Font: Cabinet Grotesk, text-8xl md:text-[120px], transparent text with a metallic gradient stroke/fill. Below it, 'GOLD MEDALIST' in small tracking-widest text.
layout.paper_details: The paper title 'Quantum Advantage in Learning...' aligned to the bottom. Large serif font (Cormorant Garamond, text-2xl, text-white). Below it, the category 'quant-ph' and 'Week 15, 2026'.
layout.score_callout: A small floating glassmorphism pill showing 'Score: 1708' floating at the top right: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm text-white.

interactions.hover: The card tilts slightly towards the mouse (Framer Motion useTransform). A glare effect (white/20 gradient) slides across the surface to simulate holographic foil.
interactions.animations: Framer Motion layout animations for smooth state transitions.

motion_and_interactions.badge_hover: Scale up by 1.05x, cursor-pointer. Drop shadow intensifies.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'share-badge-button', 'score-card-badge-pill').
